page_metadata.biotools__summary: Contains a set of function to compute mutual information matrices from continuous, categorical and survival variables. It also contains function to perform feature selection with minimum Redundancy, Maximum Relevance (mRMR) and a new ensemble mRMR technique.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Contains a set of function to compute mutual information matrices from continuous, categorical and survival variables. It also contains function to perform feature selection with minimum Redundancy, Maximum Relevance (mRMR) and a new ensemble mRMR technique.
